description:
As a land owner
  I want to register my land title
  So that I can have a verified and blockchain-recorded property ownership

elements.name: Successful land title registration with payment

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have valid land title information
I have uploaded required documents
I submit the land title registration
the land title should be created with status "PENDING"
a transaction ID should be generated
documents should be uploaded to document service
I complete the payment
the payment status should be "PAID"
the land title status should change to "ACTIVE"
the land title should be recorded on blockchain
a blockchain hash should be stored
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have valid land title information
I have not uploaded any documents
I submit the land title registration
the land title registration should fail
I should see error message "No attachments provided"
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title already exists with title number "TCT-2024-003"
I try to register a land title with the same title number "TCT-2024-003"
the land title registration should fail
I should see error message "Land title already exists"
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have a land title with status "PENDING"
I have created a payment
I cancel the payment
the payment status should be "CANCELLED"
the land title should remain "PENDING"
no blockchain recording should occur
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have a land title with status "PENDING"
I have created a payment
the payment is confirmed as "PAID"
the land title status should change to "ACTIVE"
the blockchain service should be called
the blockchain hash should be stored in database
a success event should be sent to payment service
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have a land title with status "PENDING"
I have created a payment
the blockchain service is down
the payment is confirmed as "PAID"
the land title status should change to "ACTIVE" temporarily
the blockchain recording should fail
the land title status should rollback to "PENDING"
a rollback event should be sent to payment service
the payment should be marked as "FAILED"

elements.name: Retrieve land title by title number

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with title number "TCT-2024-007"
I search for land title "TCT-2024-007"
I should see the land title details
the status should be displayed
the blockchain hash should be displayed if available
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
multiple land titles exist in the system
I request all land titles
I should see a list of 3 land titles
the list should be ordered by creation date
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
I have a land title with status "ACTIVE"
the land title has a blockchain hash
the payment is cancelled
the land title status should change to "PENDING"
a cancellation hash should be recorded on blockchain
the payment is reactivated
the land title status should change back to "ACTIVE"
a reactivation hash should be recorded on blockchain
all three hashes should be stored (original, cancellation, reactivation)

name: Land Title Registration

description:
As a land registry officer
  I want to manage land title transfers
  So that ownership can be transferred between parties

elements.name: Create land transfer with ACTIVE land title

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "ACTIVE"
I create a land transfer with buyer details
the land transfer should be created with status "PENDING"
the land title should remain "ACTIVE"

elements.name: Cannot create land transfer with PENDING land title

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
I try to create a land transfer
I should see error message "Cannot transfer land title with PENDING status"
the land transfer should not be created

elements.name: Cancel land transfer with PENDING status

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "ACTIVE"
a land transfer exists with status "PENDING"
I cancel the land transfer
the land transfer status should change to "CANCELLED"
the land title should remain "ACTIVE"

elements.name: Cannot cancel land transfer with COMPLETED status

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land transfer exists with status "COMPLETED"
I try to cancel the land transfer
I should see error message "Cannot cancel completed land transfer"

elements.name: Update land transfer with PENDING status

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land transfer exists with status "PENDING"
I update the land transfer with new buyer details
the land transfer should be updated successfully
the buyer details should reflect the new values

elements.name: Cannot update land transfer with COMPLETED status

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land transfer exists with status "COMPLETED"
I try to update the land transfer
I should see error message "Cannot update completed land transfer"

elements.name: Complete land transfer when payment is PAID

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "ACTIVE"
a land transfer exists with status "PENDING"
the transfer payment status changes to "PAID"
the land transfer status should change to "COMPLETED"
the land title status should remain "ACTIVE"
the land title owner details should be updated
the land title should have blockchain details
both seller and buyer hashes should be recorded on blockchain

name: Land Transfer Management

description:
As a system
  I want to record mortgage transactions on blockchain
  So that mortgage records are immutable and auditable

steps.name: the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has status "PENDING"
the mortgage payment is confirmed
a blockchain transaction should be submitted
the transaction should contain:
a blockchain hash should be returned
the blockchain hash should be stored in mortgage.blockchain_hash
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has status "PENDING"
the blockchain service is unavailable
the mortgage payment is confirmed
the mortgage should still be activated
an error should be logged
the blockchain_hash should be null

elements.name: Blockchain hash is unique per mortgage

steps.name: the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
2 mortgages are activated
I retrieve their blockchain hashes
each mortgage should have a different blockchain_hash
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has status "ACTIVE"
the release payment is confirmed
a release blockchain transaction should be submitted
the transaction should contain:
a release blockchain hash should be returned
the release hash should be stored in mortgage.release_blockchain_hash
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has been activated and released
I query the blockchain history for mortgage id 1
I should see 2 blockchain transactions:
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 is being activated
the blockchain transaction is submitted
the transaction should include a Unix timestamp
the timestamp should be within 1 second of current time
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has transaction_id "txn-12345"
the blockchain transaction is submitted
the blockchain record should include transaction_id "txn-12345"
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
the blockchain service has high latency
a mortgage activation is attempted
the operation should timeout after 10 seconds
an error should be logged
the mortgage should still be activated locally
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
the blockchain service fails once then succeeds
a mortgage activation is attempted
the system should retry the blockchain submission
the blockchain hash should eventually be stored
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
a blockchain hash is returned
the hash should be a non-empty string
the hash should be stored in the database
the blockchain service is running
I am logged in as a bank user
a mortgage goes through full lifecycle PENDING to ACTIVE to RELEASED
I check the mortgage record
it should have:
both hashes should be different

name: Mortgage Blockchain Integration

description:
As a bank user
  I want to create mortgages on land titles
  So that I can secure loans with property collateral

elements.name: Successfully create a mortgage on an ACTIVE land title

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has status "ACTIVE"
I create a mortgage with the following details:
the mortgage should be created successfully
the mortgage status should be "PENDING"
the mortgage lien_position should be 1

elements.name: Cannot create mortgage on PENDING land title

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-11111" has status "PENDING"
I attempt to create a mortgage on land title "TCT-11111"
the mortgage creation should fail
I should see error "Only ACTIVE land titles can be mortgaged"

elements.name: Owner name must match land title owner

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has owner "Juan Dela Cruz"
I create a mortgage with owner_name "Wrong Owner"
the mortgage creation should fail
I should see error "Owner name does not match land title owner"

elements.name: Mortgage amount cannot exceed appraised value

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has appraised_value 10000000
I create a mortgage with amount 15000000
the mortgage creation should fail
I should see error "Mortgage amount exceeds appraised value"

elements.name: Maximum 3 active mortgages per land title

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has 3 ACTIVE mortgages
I attempt to create a 4th mortgage
the mortgage creation should fail
I should see error "Maximum 3 active mortgages reached. Cannot create new mortgage."

elements.name: Auto-assign lien position based on existing mortgages

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has 2 ACTIVE mortgages
I create a new mortgage on land title "TCT-12345"
the new mortgage lien_position should be 3
the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
I create a mortgage with attachments:
the mortgage should be created successfully
the documents should be queued for upload
the documents should be linked to the mortgage_id

elements.name: Land title dropdown shows only ACTIVE titles

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
I request the land titles dropdown for mortgage
I should see only land titles with status "ACTIVE"
I should see "TCT-12345" in the dropdown
I should see "TCT-67890" in the dropdown
I should not see "TCT-11111" in the dropdown

elements.name: Cannot transfer land title with PENDING mortgage

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has a PENDING mortgage
I check transfer eligibility for land title "TCT-12345"
the land title should not be eligible for transfer
I should see "PENDING or ACTIVE mortgages block transfer"

elements.name: Cannot transfer land title with ACTIVE mortgage

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has an ACTIVE mortgage
I check transfer eligibility for land title "TCT-12345"
the land title should not be eligible for transfer

elements.name: Can transfer land title with RELEASED mortgage

steps.name: the following land titles exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
land title "TCT-12345" has a RELEASED mortgage
I check transfer eligibility for land title "TCT-12345"
the land title should be eligible for transfer

name: Mortgage Management

description:
As a bank user
  I want to pay mortgage fees
  So that mortgages can be activated and released

elements.name: Mortgage dropdown shows only PENDING mortgages

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user
I select reference_type "mortgage"
I request the mortgage dropdown
I should see only mortgages with status "PENDING"
I should see mortgage id 1 in the dropdown
I should not see mortgage id 2 in the dropdown
I should not see mortgage id 3 in the dropdown

elements.name: Successfully pay mortgage fee to activate

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has status "PENDING"
I create a payment with:
I confirm the mortgage payment
the mortgage payment status should be "PAID"
an event should be sent to activate the mortgage
mortgage id 1 status should become "ACTIVE"
a blockchain hash should be generated
the blockchain hash should be stored in mortgage

elements.name: Cannot activate mortgage if 3 ACTIVE mortgages already exist

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user
land title 1 has 3 ACTIVE mortgages
mortgage id 4 has status "PENDING" for land title 1
I pay mortgage id 4
the payment should fail
I should see mortgage error "Cannot activate mortgage: Maximum 3 active mortgages already reached"

elements.name: Edit mortgage payment details while PENDING

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage payment id 1 has status "PENDING"
I update the payment amount to 6000
the mortgage payment should be updated successfully
the payment amount should be 6000
the following mortgages exist:

mortgage payment id 1 has status "PENDING"
I cancel the mortgage payment
the mortgage payment status should be "CANCELLED"
the mortgage status should remain "PENDING"
no blockchain event should be triggered
the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user
mortgage id 1 has status "ACTIVE"
mortgage payment id 1 has status "PAID"
I attempt to cancel the payment
the cancellation should fail
I should see mortgage error "Cannot cancel PAID mortgage payment"
the mortgage status should remain "ACTIVE"
the blockchain hash should remain unchanged

elements.name: Mortgage release dropdown shows only ACTIVE mortgages

I confirm the mortgage payment

an event should be sent to release the mortgage

the release blockchain hash should be stored in mortgage

name: Mortgage Payment

description:
As a bank user
  I want to release mortgages
  So that property owners can clear their encumbrances

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 1 has status "ACTIVE"
I am the bank user who created mortgage id 1
I create a release for mortgage id 1
the release should be created successfully
a release payment should be created
the release payment status should be "PENDING"

elements.name: Only ACTIVE mortgages can be released

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 3 has status "PENDING"
I attempt to create a release for mortgage id 3
the release creation should fail
I should see mortgage error "Only ACTIVE mortgages can be released"

elements.name: Only creating bank can release mortgage

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 2 was created by bank user 200
I am bank user 100
I attempt to create a release for mortgage id 2
the release creation should fail
I should see mortgage error "Only the bank that created the mortgage can release it"
the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 1 has a PENDING release payment
I update the release payment with:
the release payment should be updated successfully
the release_fee should be 10000
the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 1 has a PENDING release payment
I cancel the release payment
the release payment status should be "CANCELLED"
the mortgage status should remain "ACTIVE"

elements.name: Cancel mortgage release payment (PAID) reverts to ACTIVE

I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 1 has status "RELEASED"
the release payment has status "PAID"
I cancel the release payment
the release payment status should be "CANCELLED"
the mortgage status should revert to "ACTIVE"
a release cancellation blockchain hash should be generated

elements.name: Pay mortgage release fee to release mortgage

mortgage id 1 has a PENDING release payment
I pay the release fee
the release payment status should be "PAID"
the mortgage status should become "RELEASED"
a release blockchain hash should be generated
the blockchain hash should be stored in release_blockchain_hash field

steps.name: the following mortgages exist:
I am logged in as a bank user with id 100
mortgage id 1 has status "RELEASED"
I check transfer eligibility for land title 1
the land title should be eligible for transfer

land title 1 has 2 ACTIVE mortgages with id 1 and 2
I release mortgage id 1
mortgage id 1 status should be "RELEASED"
mortgage id 2 status should remain "ACTIVE"

land title 1 has 2 mortgages
both mortgages have status "RELEASED"

the land title should be eligible for transfer
the following mortgages exist:

mortgage id 1 has status "ACTIVE"
the release payment is confirmed
a blockchain event should be triggered
the event should contain:
the blockchain hash should be stored

I attempt to create a release for mortgage id 999
the release creation should fail
I should see mortgage error "Mortgage not found"

name: Mortgage Release

description:
As a user
  I want to create and manage payments
  So that I can complete land title registration transactions

steps.name: the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
I am on the payments page
I click create new payment
I submit without filling required fields
I should see validation error messages
the payment should not be created
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
I am on the payments page
I click create new payment
I fill in payment details
I submit the payment form
the payment should be created successfully
the payment status should be "PENDING"
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
a payment exists with transaction ID "TXN-2024-002"
the payment status is "PENDING"
I open the actions menu for the payment
I click update payment details
I change the amount to "6000"
I change the payment method to "Bank Transfer"
I submit the update
the payment details should be updated
the payment status should remain "PENDING"

elements.name: Confirm payment and activate land title

the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
a payment exists with transaction ID "TXN-2024-003"
the payment status is "PENDING"
the associated land title status is "PENDING"
I open the actions menu for the payment
I click confirm payment
the payment status should change to "PAID"
the associated land title status should change to "ACTIVE"
a blockchain hash should be recorded

elements.name: Cancel paid payment and revert land title

the payment status is "PAID"
the associated land title status is "ACTIVE"
I open the actions menu for the payment
I click cancel payment
the payment status should change to "CANCELLED"
the associated land title status should change to "PENDING"
the Terraflow system is running
the user is authenticated
a land title exists with status "PENDING"
a payment exists with transaction ID "TXN-2024-005"
the payment status is "PENDING"
I open the actions menu for the payment
I click cancel payment
the payment status should change to "CANCELLED"
the associated land title status should remain "PENDING"
